hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [ -z "$cmd" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Unable to inspect command."}'; elif printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|\s|&&|\|\||;|\|)\s*(npm|npx|pnpm|yarn)\b'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Use bun/bunx instead of npm/npx/pnpm/yarn. This project uses bun as its package manager."}'; fi
